description: Russian crime syndicate founded in the late 1980s in the Solntsevo District of Moscow by Sergei Mikhailov and Viktor Averin. It controls transport hubs and engages in racketeering, drug trafficking, money laundering, and other crimes. The group has expanded internationally and maintains alliances with various criminal organizations.

country_links.evidence_quote: The organization is also involved in the international cocaine trade, with its links to Colombian drug cartels brokered by the Cuntrera-Caruana Mafia clan.
country_links.context: The organization is involved in the international cocaine trade with links to Colombian drug cartels.

country_links.evidence_quote: Outside Russia its also present in: Ukraine , Israel , United Kingdom , France , Spain , Hungary , United States .
country_links.context: The organization is present in France.

country_links.context: The organization is present in Hungary.

country_links.context: The organization is present in Israel.

country_links.evidence_quote: Arnold Tamm was arrested in Marbella, Spain, during the Spanish operation Oligarch ... under suspicion of ... involvement in the activities of the Solntsevskaya group.
country_links.context: A member of the Solntsevskaya group was arrested in Spain during a police operation.

country_links.evidence_quote: the Solntsevskaya dispatched Vyacheslav Ivankov to Brighton Beach, New York City, and Mikhail Odenussa to Atlanta, Georgia, to take control of the Russian mob activities there.
country_links.context: The Solntsevskaya dispatched members to New York City and Atlanta to take control of Russian mob activities there.
